description: Run the HEC-RAS unsteady flow simulation for the Muncie project using plan file Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf and run ID x04 in ~/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie. Capture all simulation output (stdout and stderr) to ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/simulation.log. Generate a performance benchmark report at ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/benchmark_report.csv with the following columns: WallClockSeconds (total execution time in seconds), SimulatedHours (duration of the modeled event in hours), PerformanceRatio_HrPerSec (calculated as SimulatedHours / WallClockSeconds), ConvergenceWarnings (count of log lines containing 'Maximum Iterations', 'extrapolated', or 'not converged'), and LogFileSize_Bytes.
